audits.name: threshold_only_homodyne
audits.blocker: The extra axis is reconstructed from the same monitoring record used by standard trajectory theory.

audits.name: semantic_partition_relabel
audits.blocker: The verdict rule is not fixed before analysis.

audits.name: same_record_branch_live
audits.blocker: The extra axis is reconstructed from the same monitoring record used by standard trajectory theory.

audits.name: constant_branch_support_family
audits.blocker: Branch support is fixed by construction, so it cannot separate TaF verdicts.

audits.name: undo_energy_proxy
audits.blocker: The reversal-cost variable is only a monotone proxy of ordinary support or coherence loss.

audits.name: independent_meter_not_decisive
audits.blocker: An independent meter exists, but it does not change the TaF verdict under fixed standard statistics.

audits.name: preregistered_channel_intervention_candidate
audits.blocker: No blocker in the finite audit; this is the minimum admissible shape, not empirical support.

strongest_claim: The weak-measurement route is non-null only in a narrow shape: a pre-registered, event-level or intervention-defined D1 axis must change the TaF verdict while the ordinary decoherence and redundancy verdict stays fixed.
what_improved: T132 upgrades the weak-measurement gate from prose into a reusable audit that can reject same-record, post hoc, constant-branch, and monotone-proxy proposals before platform-specific modeling.
weakened_claim: Most apparent T12 rescue moves are null in the present repo framing. Naming a second label, a different threshold, a constant branch count, or an undo-energy proxy does not produce a discriminator.
falsification_condition: T132 fails if a protocol lacking a pre-registered independent axis legitimately changes the TaF verdict under fixed standard statistics, or if an admitted candidate turns out to be reconstructible from the same monitored record.
q1c_update: Keep Q1C dormant. The surviving task is not to search for another suggestive weak-measurement story, but to name one concrete independent measured axis and show that it alone changes the TaF verdict.
blocker: No real platform in the repo currently instantiates the admissible candidate shape with a measured, verdict-changing independent axis.
recommended_next: Try a single monitored platform with an intervention-defined provenance or duplicated-channel axis; if that cannot be specified before modeling, demote T12 from experimental route to standing obstruction.
